title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Momonosuke, Kaido, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It really is Luffy! He was Unrecogni- Zable with his hair and clothes all white like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But his "voice" is still fading quickly....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, you're really gonna kill yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all of this, do you really think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's it!! This is the sound!!
